source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Welcome to our radio programme Travel with Me.
segments.translation: 欢迎收听我们的广播节目《跟我去旅行》。

segments.text: Today I'll recommend you a fantastic place – it's the theme park in Fun City.
segments.translation: 今天我要给大家推荐一个超棒的地方——就是欢乐城里的主题公园。

segments.text: It has been awarded the most popular tourist attraction in the city, so just follow me to find something interesting there.
segments.translation: 它被评为这座城市最受欢迎的旅游景点，所以就跟着我一起去看看那里有什么好玩的吧。

segments.text: The park opens at 9.30 every morning.
segments.translation: 公园每天早上9点半开门。

segments.text: For the first activity, I definitely advise you shouldn't miss the riding in the park.
segments.translation: 第一个项目，我强烈建议你们千万别错过园内的骑乘项目。

segments.text: The actual riding begins at 10 am.
segments.translation: 真正的骑乘项目上午10点才开始。

segments.text: But I suggest you arrive a little earlier before the opening time; otherwise, there might be a long wait.
segments.translation: 不过我建议你们在开门前早点到，不然可能要排很长时间的队。

segments.text: And how much, you may ask, does an entrance ticket cost?
segments.translation: 你们可能会问，门票要多少钱呢？

segments.text: Well, there are two types of tickets: Basic ticket and Family-fast-line Track ticket.
segments.translation: 是这样的，门票有两种：基础票和家庭快速通道票。

segments.text: You can either buy a ticket at the ticket office near the main entrance to the park, or reserve from the official website in advance.
segments.translation: 你们可以在公园正门附近的售票处买票，也可以提前在官网上预订。

segments.text: The latter is preferable as it always offers a discount.
segments.translation: 后者更划算，因为网上总会有折扣。

segments.text: For example, the original price for a Basic ticket is 89 pounds, but if you buy it online, it only costs 78 pounds.
segments.translation: 比如说，基础票原价是89英镑，但要是在网上买，只要78英镑。

segments.text: For the Family-fast-line Track ticket, you only have to pay 95 pounds on the Internet instead of its original price 113 pounds.
segments.translation: 家庭快速通道票在网上只要付95英镑，而原价是113英镑。

segments.text: Visiting the lake in the park is also a good choice.
segments.translation: 去公园里的湖边看看也是个不错的选择。

segments.text: There is a new refreshment room beside the lake, and the latest thing – it was only finished last month – is the Splash Ride.
segments.translation: 湖边有一个新建的休息室，最新的项目——上个月才刚建好的——就是水花滑道。

segments.text: It is a new area and pretty exciting.
segments.translation: 这是个新区域，相当刺激。

segments.text: Forget about wearing waterproofs because you'll still get wet, and don't take cameras either.
segments.translation: 别指望穿雨衣管用，因为你还是会被淋湿，另外也别带相机。

segments.text: As a result, I strongly advise that the best time to visit the lake is in the hottest season, in case you catch a cold.
segments.translation: 所以我强烈建议，游湖最好选在最热的季节，免得着凉感冒。

segments.text: Another activity you'll find exciting is riding the rollercoaster bike.
segments.translation: 另一个你会觉得很刺激的项目是骑过山车自行车。

segments.text: I suggest families with children go for a try, as it's always favoured by them.
segments.translation: 我建议带孩子的家庭去试试，因为它一直很受他们欢迎。

segments.text: This rollercoaster bike is different from the normal one in that it's made of wood, so it's lighter.
segments.translation: 这种过山车自行车和普通的不一样，它是木头做的，所以更轻。

segments.text: The person who designed it has won a special prize for innovation.
segments.translation: 设计它的人还因为这个创新拿了一个特别奖。

segments.text: For those who are not interested in these exciting activities, there is a resort for you.
segments.translation: 对于那些对这些刺激项目不感兴趣的人，还有一个休闲区可以去。

segments.text: You can sit there talking, relaxing or taking photos.
segments.translation: 你们可以坐在那里聊天、放松或者拍照。

segments.text: Please remember, this section is for a picnic, so you have to prepare your own snacks.
segments.translation: 请记住，这个区域是用来野餐的，所以你们得自己准备零食。

segments.text: But don't worry about drinks, since free bottled water is available there.
segments.translation: 不过饮料倒不用担心，那里提供免费的瓶装水。

segments.text: Oh, one more thing is, it's better to take a picnic blanket to sit on.
segments.translation: 哦，还有一件事，最好带一块野餐垫坐。

segments.text: After the picnic, if there is some time left, you can take part in some other interesting activities you like, such as watching the circus or going fishing.
segments.translation: 野餐之后，如果还有时间，你们可以去参加一些自己喜欢的其他有趣活动，比如看马戏或者钓鱼。

segments.text: At the end of the one-day trip, there is a special event for you – the firework display.
segments.translation: 在这一天行程的最后，还有一个特别的项目等着你们——烟花表演。

segments.text: You'll enjoy a spectacular show in the sky.
segments.translation: 你们会欣赏到一场壮观的天空表演。

segments.text: Everyone is cheering.
segments.translation: 所有人都在欢呼。

segments.text: I think it's a must for you, with a perfect ending of the day.
segments.translation: 我觉得这个你们一定不能错过，给这一天画上一个完美的句号。

segments.text: OK, that was something about the most basic information, and now here's some more practical information about four popular activities on the brochure of the theme park, because some people want to know whether they're worth trying.
segments.translation: 好，以上就是一些最基本的信息，现在再给大家讲一些更实用的内容，是关于这个主题公园宣传册上四个热门项目的，因为有些人想知道这些项目值不值得一试。

segments.text: Well, let's first look at the Cowboy Show.
segments.translation: 好，我们先来看看牛仔秀。

segments.text: It's a dance show by a group of boys wearing cowboy boots and hats.
segments.translation: 这是一群穿着牛仔靴、戴着牛仔帽的男孩表演的舞蹈秀。

segments.text: What they perform tells the stories of cowboys' life.
segments.translation: 他们表演的内容讲的是牛仔的生活故事。

segments.text: Rest assured that you don't need to queue for hours to get in.
segments.translation: 放心，你们不用排上几个小时的队才能进去。

segments.text: So please come and enjoy it.
segments.translation: 所以快来欣赏吧。

segments.text: Then there is the Driving School Ride.
segments.translation: 接下来是驾驶学校游乐项目。

segments.text: In this activity, you can try a variety of vehicles.
segments.translation: 在这个项目里，你们可以尝试各种各样的车辆。

segments.text: But please note that this one is only for those below 1.2 metres.
segments.translation: 但请注意，这个项目只面向身高1.2米以下的人。

segments.text: The staff will measure your height at the entrance.
segments.translation: 工作人员会在入口处量你们的身高。

segments.text: Parents can just have a rest on the chair and watch their kids playing.
segments.translation: 家长可以坐在椅子上休息，看着孩子玩。

segments.text: You don't have to be worried about safety, as everyone is guided by a coach throughout the process.
segments.translation: 你们不用担心安全问题，因为全程都有教练指导。

segments.text: As to Rollercoaster Jumping, it is the scariest activity, as you will experience the vertical dropping, so it might be a good choice for those who like extreme sports.
segments.translation: 至于过山车跳跃，这是最吓人的项目，因为你会体验垂直下坠，所以对于喜欢极限运动的人来说可能是个不错的选择。

segments.text: Of course, children are not allowed to join in.
segments.translation: 当然，儿童是不允许参加的。

segments.text: The last one is the Magic Show.
segments.translation: 最后一个是魔术秀。

segments.text: I'm sure you'll be attracted by the charm of the magician.
segments.translation: 我敢肯定你们会被魔术师的魅力吸引住。

segments.text: You can hear the audience burst into applause throughout the show.
segments.translation: 整场表演中你都能听到观众爆发出的掌声。

segments.text: Please promise me don't leave early because just as horror stories won't tell you until the end, there is something unexpected waiting for you.
segments.translation: 请答应我别提前离场，因为就像恐怖故事总是留到最后才揭晓一样，有一个意想不到的惊喜在等着你们。

segments.text: I'm sure you won't regret it.
segments.translation: 我保证你们不会后悔的。

segments.text: OK, that's all I want to recommend to you today.
segments.translation: 好，以上就是我今天想给大家推荐的全部内容。

segments.text: If you want to know about more fascinating tourist attractions, please wait for our programme next week.
segments.translation: 如果你们还想了解更多迷人的旅游景点，请期待我们下周的节目。

segments.text: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！
